title: Stage 01–05 proposal — frontmatter + required-sections contract
description: Lightweight shared typed contract for the MARKDOWN stages of /mkt-creative-run (design §2/§6.1). Stages 01–05 are prose PROPOSALS (market read, segments, motivators, force-map, personas) written to context/proposed/ for human review — they are NOT JSON. Their typed contract is therefore (a) this YAML FRONTMATTER object and (b) a required_sections convention: the H2/H3 headings the proposal must contain so a structural check can confirm the stage produced the expected shape. Stage map: Stage 00 = ads-signal.schema.json (deterministic JSON); Stages 01–05 = markdown validated by THIS schema's frontmatter + required headings; Stages 06–10 = the typed JSON schemas stage-06..stage-10. A validator parses the markdown frontmatter into this object and asserts each required_sections heading is present in the body. status gates promotion: draft → reviewed → approved before any proposed/ content is merged into approved context/.

frontmatter.description: The YAML frontmatter block at the top of a Stage 01–05 markdown proposal. The five required keys (status/source/owner/updated/market) are the provenance floor; the optional keys carry the extra trace some stages emit (e.g. a sample stage names its persona/run_id/locale).

status.description: Review state of the proposal. draft = first-pass (default); reviewed = a human has read it; approved = promoted/ready to merge into approved context/. Gates promotion.

source.description: Where the proposal came from (e.g. '/mkt-creative-run Stages 03–04 (UNVERIFIED — first-pass)').

owner.description: Accountable owner (e.g. an email) for reviewing/merging this proposal.

market.description: Primary market the proposal addresses (e.g. 'VN'), from marketing.config.json.

locale.description: Optional primary locale (e.g. 'vi-VN') when the proposal is locale-specific.

kind.description: Optional artifact-kind note (e.g. a SAMPLE banner string) some hand-built proposals carry.

persona.description: Optional persona this proposal centers on (Stage 05 / sample artifacts).

run_id.description: Optional run id (e.g. 20260608-072919) when the proposal belongs to a specific creative run.

derived_from.description: Optional upstream artifact this proposal derives from (e.g. a prior stage file).

required_sections.description: The H2/H3 heading texts (without the leading #s) the proposal body MUST contain for this stage. A structural validator asserts each string appears as a heading in the markdown — the typed equivalent of 'this stage produced the expected sections'. Convention, not the prose itself.
